channel.title: GitHub R Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of R in GitHub

item.title: satijalab/seurat
item.description: R toolkit for single cell genomics

item.title: sqjin/CellChat
item.description: R toolkit for inference, visualization and analysis of cell-cell communication from single-cell data

item.title: broadinstitute/infercnv
item.description: Inferring CNV from Single-Cell RNA-Seq

item.title: rstudio/renv
item.description: renv: Project environments for R.

item.title: chris-mcginnis-ucsf/DoubletFinder
item.description: R package for detecting doublets in single-cell RNA sequencing data

item.title: joey711/phyloseq
item.description: phyloseq is a set of classes, wrappers, and tools (in R) to make it easier to import, store, and analyze phylogenetic sequencing data; and to reproducibly share that data and analysis with others. See the phyloseq front page:

item.title: saeyslab/nichenetr
item.description: NicheNet: predict active ligand-target links between interacting cells

item.title: GreenleafLab/ArchR
item.description: ArchR : Analysis of Regulatory Chromatin in R (www.ArchRProject.com)

item.title: YuLab-SMU/clusterProfiler
item.description: 📊 A universal enrichment tool for interpreting omics data

item.title: mojaveazure/seurat-disk
item.description: Interfaces for HDF5-based Single Cell File Formats

item.title: tidyverse/ggplot2
item.description: An implementation of the Grammar of Graphics in R

item.title: tidyverse/ellmer
item.description: Call LLM APIs from R

item.title: briatte/awesome-network-analysis
item.description: A curated list of awesome network analysis resources.

item.title: jokergoo/ComplexHeatmap
item.description: Make Complex Heatmaps

item.title: kassambara/survminer
item.description: Survival Analysis and Visualization

item.title: rstudio/rmarkdown
item.description: Dynamic Documents for R

item.title: stuart-lab/signac
item.description: R toolkit for the analysis of single-cell chromatin data

item.title: sparklyr/sparklyr
item.description: R interface for Apache Spark

item.title: immunogenomics/harmony
item.description: Fast, sensitive and accurate integration of single-cell data with Harmony
